title: Teresina, PI — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Teresina, PI: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Teresina is a city in PI with a population of 871,126. The only northeastern capital not on the coast, known for its intense heat, riverside setting, and the Parque Nacional da Serra da Capivara nearby.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
